title: Bare Bones x Farmer's Delight PBR
description: PBR texture for Bare Bones x Farmer's Delight ! 🍲
body:
This resource pack adds PBR to [Bare Bones x Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-x-farmers-delight) !

You have to place it above the default Bare Bones x Farmer's Delight

I also use [Bare Bones PBR x128](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-pbr-x128) in the screenshots
